title: Paper Glossary
description: Schema for glossary.json companion files — domain-specific term definitions

glossary.description: Alphabetically ordered list of terms defined or used in this paper

definition.description: Clear, precise definition of the term as used in this paper

aliases.description: Alternative names or abbreviations for this term

paper_specific.description: Whether this definition is specific to this paper or series versus standard in the field

related_terms.description: Other terms in this glossary that are closely related

see_also.description: External references (claim_ids, section references, or external URLs) for further reading
